---
pagetitle: "Multi-type Point Processes to characterize infectious disease transmission across many covariates"
output-file: oliver_ratmann_multi-type-pp-for-high-dim-flows.html
---
---

::: {.presentation-title .no-incremental}

# Multi-type Point Processes to characterize infectious disease transmission across many covariates

- Oliver Ratmann, PhD\
  Associate Professor in Statistics and Machine Learning for Public Good\
  Imperial College London

- Dynamics & Evolution 2026  
  May 21, 2026

:::

{{< include _generated/slides.qmd >}}
